ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_label" INTEGER /* Label for the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver currently assigned to the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle making the trip */,
  "road_order" TEXT /* Order of the roads taken during the trip */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the trip in seconds */,
  "leading_vehicles" TEXT /* Leading vehicles encountered during the trip */,
  "stopped_time" TEXT /* Time spent stopped during the trip */,
  "stop_while_front" TEXT /* Data indicating if the vehicle stopped while in front of another vehicle */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number for the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the starting location of the trip */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ending location of the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver of the vehicle during the trip */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES vehicle_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES vehicle_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roads" (
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road */,
  "road_name" TEXT /* Name of the road */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of the road (e.g., highway, street) */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the road in kilometers */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the road is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the road is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the road is located */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the road */,
  "traffic_light_density" REAL /* Average density of traffic lights per kilometer */,
  "accident_rate" REAL /* Average accident rate on the road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_profiles" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the driver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "driving_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was recorded */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the recorded location */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction of the vehicle in degrees */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle at the recorded location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road where the vehicle is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road where the signal is located */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the traffic signal (e.g., red, green, yellow) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the traffic signal (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the traffic signal */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the traffic signal */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the signal */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance of the signal */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the signal was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_events" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop event */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trip during which the stop occurred */,
  "stop_time" REAL /* Duration of the stop in seconds */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stop (e.g., traffic, signal) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the stop occurred */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road where the stop occurred */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic signal (if applicable) */,
  "speed_before_stop" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle before stopping */,
  "speed_after_stop" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle after stopping */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_events_road_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_id") REFERENCES roads ("road_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES vehicle_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_events_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES traffic_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_events_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_location" TEXT /* Location where the maintenance was performed */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  "inspection_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle passed the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_logs" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route log */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the route */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the route */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver who took the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of the route (e.g., delivery, personal) */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route for easy identification */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the route */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle during the route */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the roads during the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_logs_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES driver_profiles ("driver_id")
)
